conflicts.description: The prior continuity sheet labeled Junie as Silas's older sister in one entry and implied Silas was the older sibling in the other. The manuscript establishes siblinghood and household dependence but never states birth order.
conflicts.evidence: Sibling/household scenes without any birth-order statement: snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.post_revision.md:823; snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.post_revision.md:3356; snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.post_revision.md:7034
conflicts.canonical_value: Silas and Junie are recorded simply as siblings; older/younger labeling is removed.
conflicts.resolution_note: The manuscript does not support a birth-order claim, so the updated sheet preserves the sibling tie and removes the unsupported contradiction instead of inventing a hierarchy.
